name: sed
description: Stream editor for filtering and transforming text. Reads from standard input and applies editing commands to each line. Supports substitution (s/pattern/replacement/), deletion (d), insertion, and extraction of specific lines by number or pattern. Use -E for extended regular expressions. Use for find-and-replace, deleting lines matching a pattern, extracting a range of lines, or reformatting text.

input.description: Text to transform, provided on standard input. The first argument is the editing command (e.g. 's/old/new/g', '3,5d', '/pattern/p').

output.description: Transformed text after applying the editing commands, one line per line.
